public_reputation: Back-alley legal alchemist selling prison soap, burn kits, lamp oils, and occasionally something far less permitted.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Roaz, that reads as someone precise, disciplined, and legality-first, with little patience for disorder, and the habits of a alchemists still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of alchemists in and around Ithtananalor, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ithtananalor workable through the obligations of alchemists while managing the immediate pressure of illicit magic in Roaz.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Ithtananalor, that usually means carrying illicit magic, smuggling, public accountability for harsh enforcement without letting the role of alchemists visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Orren Pike can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Orren Pike can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained.
public_signal: Orren Pike carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia. In Ithtananalor, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Lord Aric Roaz, Office of Roazian Enforcement.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ithtananalor: the part of Ithtananalor where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
